title: Unpacked 2-D Array Not Supported as Mailbox Type

features.name: class typedef with unpacked array type
features.description: Code should include a class with a typedef that defines an unpacked array type using parameter-defined size

features.name: mailbox parameterized with unpacked array type
features.description: Code should include a mailbox parameterized with an unpacked array type defined via typedef

features.name: unpacked array mailbox inside class constructor
features.description: Code should include a mailbox with unpacked array type that is constructed inside a class constructor
